works.title: Pasar Antar
works.desc: A real-time traditional market delivery platform. Engineered a 3-party state machine connecting buyers, shoppers, and admins with live WebSocket updates and background order aggregation.

works.title: Singkat Saja
works.desc: High-performance URL shortener and redirect engine. Features custom aliases, expiration constraints, and a built-in analytics dashboard to track click engagement and traffic metrics.

works.title: Vendura
works.desc: Enterprise compliance and contract management system. Implemented multi-tier approval workflows, document versioning, and automated background jobs for expiration tracking.

works.title: StikIn
works.tag: Laravel • Blade • Alpine.js • WA Gateway • MySQL
works.desc: PlayStation rental booking system built to handle high-concurrency race conditions. Utilizes strict database row-locking to guarantee zero double-bookings alongside real-time WhatsApp alerts.
